title: AOTM Lunch Bags for Women, 12L Large Insulated Lunch Box with Adjustable Shoulder Straps, Multi-Pockets Pack Lunch Bag Reusable Picnic Cooler Bag for Girls Adults, Lunch Tote for Work/School/Travel
features: 🎀【Large Capacity & Thickened Design】This 12L large-capacity lunch bag features a thickened and expandable design, measuring 11.4"L × 6.7"W × 9.0"H( 29.0cm ×17.0cm ×22.8cm ). It easily holds multiple lunch boxes, fruits, snacks, ice packs, and tableware, meeting the needs of various scenarios such as work commutes, day trips, and picnics. It is an ideal all-in-one solution combining the functions of a portable cooler bag, lunch tote bag, and picnic bag.

🎀【Long-Lasting Temperature Retention & Freshness Preservation】The exterior is reinforced with wear-resistant oxford cloth/corduroy, while the interior is lined with a thickened pearl cotton insulation layer. The dual-layer temperature-locking structure ensures long-lasting heat and cold retention. Whether it’s cold drinks, frozen treats, hot meals, or warm dishes, everything stays fresh and delicious for extended periods.

🎀【Stain-Resistant, Easy-to-Clean & Adjustable Straps】The inner liner is made of food-grade PEVA material, allowing stains to be wiped away effortlessly. Equipped with a detachable and adjustable shoulder strap (23-43 inches), supports three carrying ways: hand-held, single-shoulder, and cross-body, so you can switch freely. Perfect for daily commutes, it doubles as a insulated lunch bag, snack pouch, shopping bag, picnic bag, or makeup bag, fitting seamlessly into work, school, travel.

🎀【Multi-Pocket & Organized Compartment Design】Stylish and practical in one: The main zippered compartment stores staple foods and fruits with long-lasting temperature retention. Side mesh pockets hold drinks and water bottles. The front independent insulated zippered pocket is ideal for small snacks or daily essentials. The back hidden pocket keeps tissues, tableware, earphones, and charging cables organized. Sort your work and travel items neatly for maximum storage efficiency.

🎁【Stylish & Versatile, Perfect Gift Choice】A perfect blend of fashion and functionality! It works as an office lunch bag, snack organizer, or makeup bag in daily life, and can even be used as a trendy cross-body bag. Suitable for ✔ Office ✔ Travel ✔ Picnic ✔ Shopping and more occasions. It is a thoughtful gift for your best friend, girlfriend, daughter, mom, and loved ones, exuding elegance in every scenario.
